title: mutisia viciifolia var. genuina
intro: Mutisia viciifolia var. genuina is a plant species native to the Andes Mountains, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Mutisia viciifolia var. genuina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
